## Image Description for Cataloguing

**Title:** Two Sailboats Moored on the Deben Estuary

**Description:** Two small sailboats are moored side-by-side on a calm body of water, likely the Deben Estuary in England. The sailboats are the primary focus, with the one on the left being a darker hull with a white deck and a red and white sail partially furled. The sailboat on the right has a lighter hull, a white deck, and a red sail also partially furled. Both boats have masts and rigging visible. 

A small, brown duck is swimming near the stern of the lighter sailboat. The water is a muted grey-blue, reflecting the overcast sky. The background is dominated by lush green trees lining the bank of the estuary, creating a natural and peaceful setting. The trees are dense and varied, suggesting a healthy riparian environment. 

The overall scene is tranquil and depicts a typical day on the water. The lighting is soft and diffused, consistent with an overcast day.
